coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 4-group, 154-node closure.
validation: The authored raised-tile sphere matches Blender exactly at 32,190 vertices / 58,917 faces with identical four-decimal local bounds. Mesh Face Area restores the per-face tile scale, while Blender-native subdivided Cube vertex and face ordering makes the graph's alternating Index modulo selection choose the same tessellation faces before Merge by Distance. The browser now reconstructs the assigned two-Wave pink knit material and Bump normal on 58,191 faces while preserving Blender's neutral fallback on the 726 unassigned shell faces. Precise transformed-vertex framing corrects the previous 53% rotated-AABB inflation. The committed 768 x 768 authored comparison reaches 0.9714 silhouette IoU, 0.0661 macro luminance MAE, 0.9244 macro correlation, 0.2672 RGB MAE, and -0.0547 mean-luminance error.

materialParity.scope: Authored Blender viewport material parity on the exact Geometry Nodes mesh; this is neither slicing nor a G-code toolpath.
